message:
test(unit): add inline tests for cx.rs and resize_scheduler.rs (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- cx.rs: 15 new tests (from 0) covering RuntimePreset, RuntimeTuning,
  CxRuntimeBuilder chain methods, with_cx passthrough, for_testing
- resize_scheduler.rs: 20 new tests covering input guardrail budget
  reservation, overdeferred drop, domain budget throttling, completion
  rejection on superseded intents, lifecycle ring buffer truncation,
  control plane toggles, serde roundtrips, stalled transaction age,
  zero work_units normalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
